prompt: A large circular stone courtyard at dusk, seen from a slightly elevated perspective. At the exact geometric center stands a single person, alone, facing outward toward the viewer. Around the perimeter and spread across the courtyard, dozens of other people stand in dense, animated clusters of conversation — pairs, trios, small groups — all deeply engaged with each other, their bodies angled inward toward their companions. The social energy flows laterally across the space in all directions, forming a rich web of interaction that completely bypasses the central figure. Every cluster is connected to adjacent clusters through overlapping social ties, except the person at the center, who is equidistant from all groups and part of none. The lighting is warm and golden on the groups at the edges; the central figure stands in a slightly cooler pool of ambient light. The composition is perfectly symmetrical in geometry but profoundly asymmetrical in human connection. Cinematic realist photography, large format, sharp depth of field throughout, no motion blur, golden hour light. Negative prompt: text, labels, numbers, diagrams, charts, arrows, social media interface, phones, network diagrams, graph nodes, floating elements, surreal, supernatural, fantastical
visual_logic: A figure at the geometric center of a circular gathering is socially untouched by any connection, while all peripheral figures are densely interconnected — spatial centrality and social peripherality occupy the same body simultaneously.
